subTitle.v: Đơn vị %u1 - %u2, ngày chứng từ từ %d1 đến %d2, chứng từ %s1 - %s2...
subTitle.e: Unit %u1 - %u2, Voucher Date from %d1 to %d2, Voucher %s1 - %s2...

command.text:
declare @e char(1), @v varchar(6), @l int select @e = case when exists(select 1 from options where name = 'm_ky_hddt' and val = '1') then '1' else '0' end select @v = rtrim(val) from options where name = 'm_ei_external' select @l = val from options where name = 'm_limit_invoice_hddt' select @l = isnull(@l, 255)
select 'var t=this;t._url$ExternalScript=''~/AppHandler/ExternalScript.ashx?t=j0&v=' + replace(isnull(@v,'0'),'','''') + ''';' + case when @e = '1' then 'load$ExternalScript(t);' else '' end + 't._url$EInvoice=''~/AppService/FastBusiness.EInvoice.Service.asmx'';t._service$Method=''ExcuteCommand'';t._$limitedInvoice=' + rtrim(@l) + ';load$GridReport$(t);load$EInvoice$(t);' as message return
